title: Calculate exact window metrics
description: Account for exact recorded spend across the selected day, week, and month-to-date windows without hiding plan absence, category gaps, refunds, or zero results. Goal trace: G1 and G2.
rationale: Derived insight is credible only when every displayed value reconciles to authoritative exact inputs.
story_want: see exact recorded spending for each explicit window and category bucket
story_so_that: every interpretation can be reconciled to BUDGET and LEDGER
acceptance_criteria: Given a complete coherent evidence set, when exact metrics are calculated, then one total actual metric is returned for each requested day, week, and month-to-date window.
Given a requested category breakdown, when exact metrics are calculated, then every stable category present in plan or actual evidence is accounted for in deterministic category-identity order.

Given plan entries with zero amount, actual categories omitted from the plan, or uncategorized actuals, when metrics are returned, then Zero Budget, Unbudgeted, and Uncategorized remain distinct explicit buckets.
Given refunds or reversals that make a window or category net actual negative, when metrics are returned, then the signed exact value is preserved and is not clamped to zero.
Given no matching recorded actuals in a started window, when metrics are returned, then the exact value is zero with a successful evidence state rather than Not Found.
Given no Budget Plan, when exact actual metrics are available, then they are returned with No Budget Plan on every plan-relative field.
Given exact category and bucket values, when totals are returned, then total actual equals the checked exact sum of Budgeted, Zero Budget, Unbudgeted, and Uncategorized values.
Given any Int64 overflow, undefined exact operation, or reconciliation failure, when metrics are calculated, then the entire report fails with no partial financial output.
